steps.title: Initial Setup/Scanning
steps.instruction: Run discovery scan using ping sweep with multiple ICMP types to identify active hosts
steps.tip: Start with the most reliable information source for nmap advanced scan playbook
steps.expected_output: List of active hosts within the target subnet responsive to ping requests

steps.title: Data Collection/Configuration
steps.instruction: Execute stealth scan with slow timing and fragmentation to evade detection systems
steps.tip: Organize data systematically to avoid duplicates and ensure coverage
steps.expected_output: SYN scan results confirming open ports while minimizing IDS/IPS alerts

steps.title: Analysis/Enumeration
steps.instruction: Perform full port scan across all 65535 ports to identify non-standard service ports
steps.tip: Look for patterns and correlations in collected data
steps.expected_output: Complete list of all open ports on the target regardless of standard assignments

steps.title: Advanced Technique/Filtering
steps.instruction: Run service detection and default NSE scripts against discovered ports
steps.tip: Use multiple techniques to increase coverage and accuracy
steps.expected_output: Service versions, banners, and script output revealing service configurations and vulnerabilities

steps.title: Correlation/Testing
steps.instruction: Execute vulnerability detection scripts targeting identified services
steps.tip: Validate findings across different tools and methods
steps.expected_output: List of potential vulnerabilities associated with discovered service versions

steps.title: Validation/Exploitation
steps.instruction: Parse Nmap results to extract only open ports for further analysis
steps.expected_output: Filtered list of open ports ready for targeted exploitation attempts

steps.title: Documentation/Reporting
steps.instruction: Export comprehensive scan results in multiple formats for documentation
steps.tip: Review all findings before compilation for accuracy and completeness
steps.expected_output: Nmap output files in gnmap, xml, and txt formats for reporting and tool integration
